race.description: Elite Sand & Soil Super Mdn Plate
race.comment: HELLFIGHTER (1) deep into the campaign and raced without luck at his last two starts from wide gates. Taken back from the draw when he gave away a big start to run ninth over 1625m at Wyong. Can stalk the speed today and get the job done. MASTER JOHNNY (3) big improver second-up when taken to the front for a game second over 1400m at Newcastle. Gets map favours again and has the upside to go close. ROYAL PRINCESS (10) resumes. Far from disgraced when she stretched out in trip last prep in town. Back with the two trials and maps well. Keep safe. THE PROSPECT (5) drifted back early and made inroads late with a plugging sixth over 1400m at Newcastle. Has a host of gear changes and must be kept safe.
